en.extract:
The purplish-mantled tanager (Iridosornis porphyrocephalus) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae.
It is found in Colombia and Ecuador.
Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forests and heavily degraded former forest.
It is threatened by habitat loss.

The '''purplish-mantled tanager''' ('''''Iridosornis porphyrocephalus''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Thraupidae]].
It is found in [[Colombia]] and [[Ecuador]].
Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s and heavily degraded former forest.
It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].
